key.name: window-width
key.description: Width of the main application window in pixels.

key.name: window-height
key.description: Height of the main application window in pixels.

key.name: window-maximized
key.description: Whether the main window is maximized.

key.name: sidebar-width
key.description: Width of the sidebar/paned position in pixels.

key.name: last-content-type
key.description: The last selected content type (text, url, wifi, vcard, calendar, gps, sms).

key.name: last-dot-style
key.description: The last selected dot style (rounded, square, dots, diamond, custom).

key.name: last-ec-level
key.description: The last selected error correction level (L, M, Q, H).

key.name: last-language
key.description: Language code for the interface (de, en, es, fr, it, pt-br, ja, ko, zh-cn).
